prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，从2021年198名升至2026年157名，学校综合实力稳步增强；近年声誉 平稳，无明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第79位，评价"一般"，短视频平台曝光度中等偏低；未见投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，优 势学科主要集中在朝鲜语、中国语言文学等特色领域，整体学科竞争力一般。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学、临床医学、电子信息/通信、计算机类等专业社会热度偏热至高热；工商管理、高分子材料与工程（生化环材）热度明显劝退；本省2026年考生总数约40万人，较2025年29万人大幅增加约37.6%，竞争显著加剧；延边大学位于吉林省延边朝鲜族自治州，距浙江较远，地域偏好较弱；该校在浙江招生占比约0.5%–0.6%，属于该校省外招生中占比 极低的省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、本省考生大幅增加及学校排名上升等多重因素：考生大幅增加理论上加剧竞争，但延边大学在 浙江吸引力连续5年下降且2025年后移加速，学校排名上升的正面效应尚不足以扭转下降惯性；预计2026年最低录取位次约63119名，区间62619–63619名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间62619–63619名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。若位次明显优于区间下限（如62000名以内），可重点冲刺法学热 门专业；若位次接近区间上限（如63500名以外），建议以三档专业选择，避免热门专业滑档风险。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking has shifted from approximately 39583 → 42068 → 45061 → 51879 → 61619, continuously moving backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 22000 places; the backward movement has accelerated in the last two years, with a shift of about 9740 places from 2024 to 2025, and the 2025 baseline is approximately 61619; the provincial enrollment plan was 29 in 2021 → 32 in 2022 → 32 in 2023 → 35 in 2024 → 35 in 2025; in 2026, the comprehensive category has 26 students plus the medical category has 9 students, totaling 35, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science China University Ranking has been steadily rising in recent years, from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, indicating a steady enhancement of the school's comprehensive strength; recent reputation has been stable, with no obvious negative public opinion incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 79th, with a rating of 'average', indicating moderately low exposure on short video platforms; no records of enrollment gaps have been observed; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no disciplines rated A- or above, with advantageous disciplines mainly concentrated in characteristic fields such as Korean Language and Chinese Language and Literature, resulting in generally average disciplinary competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Law, Clinical Medicine, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science are socially popular to very popular; majors like Business Administration and Polymer Materials and Engineering (biochemistry, environmental, materials) are clearly discouraged; in 2026, the total number of examinees in this province is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.6% compared to 290,000 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition; Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin Province, far from Zhejiang, with weak geographical preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Zhejiang is about 0.5%–0.6%, making it a province with an extremely low proportion of out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a significant increase in provincial examinees, and the rising school ranking: the large increase in examinees theoretically intensifies competition, but Yanbian University's attractiveness in Zhejiang has been declining for 5 consecutive years with accelerated backward movement in 2025, and the positive effect of the rising school ranking is not yet sufficient to reverse the downward inertia; it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be approximately 63119, with a range of 62619–63619.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 62619–63619, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 62000), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Law; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 63500), it is recommended to choose Tier 3 majors to avoid the risk of sliding out of popular majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 延边大学医学类在浙江省2021至2025年最低录取位次分别为41547、46298、51939、60552、65138，呈现持续下降趋势（位次数字逐年增大，即录取难度逐年降低）。招生计划方 面，2021年7人，2022年8人，2023年8人，2024年9人，2025年9人，2026年招生计划仍为9人，与2025年持平。计划不变意味着供需弹性主值无变化，但结合近年位次持续下滑的趋 势，预计2026年位次仍将小幅下移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 延边大学位于吉林省延边朝鲜族自治州，是国家211工程重点建设高校，同时入选双一流建设高校。作为综合性大学，其医学类专业在东北地区有一定影响力，但在浙江省属于省 外招生，受地域距离因素影响，对浙江考生的吸引力相对有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在全国范围内持续保持较高报考热度，临床医学、麻醉学等专业竞争激烈。延边大学医学类在浙江省招生规模较小（每年仅7-9人），专业设置包括临床医学、麻醉学 、药学类三个方向，其中药学类为最低分专业。由于学校地处东北边疆，地理位置对浙江考生而言相对偏远，一定程度上影响了报考意愿。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型和历史趋势，预测2026年延边大学医学类在浙江省最低录取位次约为65438名，较2025年（65138名）小幅下降约300名，位次数字增大意味着录取门槛略有降低 。波动区间为64938至65938名，建议考生在此区间内合理规划志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Yanbian University's medical category in Zhejiang Province from 2021 to 2025 are 41547, 46298, 51939, 60552, and 65138 respectively, showing a continuous downward trend (the ranking number increases year by year, meaning admission difficulty decreases year by year). In terms of enrollment plan, there were 7 students in 2021, 8 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 9 in 2025, with the 2026 enrollment plan still being 9 students, unchanged from 2025. The unchanged plan means that the main value of supply-demand elasticity remains unchanged, but combined with the continuous downward trend of rankings in recent years, it is expected that the ranking in 2026 will still slightly decrease.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin Province. It is a national key university under the 211 Project and is also selected as a Double First-Class construction university. As a comprehensive university, its medical majors have a certain influence in the Northeast region, but it recruits students from outside the province in Zhejiang Province. Affected by geographical distance, its appeal to Zhejiang candidates is relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to maintain high application popularity nationwide, with fierce competition in majors such as Clinical Medicine and Anesthesiology. Yanbian University's medical category has a small enrollment scale in Zhejiang Province (only 7-9 students per year), with majors including Clinical Medicine, Anesthesiology, and Pharmacy, among which Pharmacy is the lowest-scoring major. Due to the school's location in the northeastern border area, the geographical location is relatively remote for Zhejiang candidates, which to some extent affects their willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Yanbian University's medical category in Zhejiang Province in 2026 will be approximately 65438, a slight decrease of about 300 places compared to 2025 (65138). The increase in ranking number means a slight decrease in admission threshold. The fluctuation range is 64938 to 65938, and it is recommended that candidates plan their applications reasonably within this range.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to mainly target Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety.
